description: Swagger provides API design, documentation, and related tooling around OpenAPI and AsyncAPI. Its swagger.io site also hosts documentation for open-source tools such as Swagger Codegen, Swagger Editor, and Swagger UI.
summary: swagger.io exposes a public HTTP API for the Swagger Codegen online generator at `https://generator.swagger.io/api`, documented by an OpenAPI spec; no GraphQL, MCP, or first-party CLI surface was found on swagger.io itself.
